body:
## Rationale

Three drummer gear price history pages currently absent from `packages/frontend/data/gearPriceHistory.js` (15 entries in DB) and absent from open batch proposals 18-25.

**Confirmed absent from DB:** Paul Mazurkiewicz, Flo Mounier, Eloy Casagrande.

### 1. Paul Mazurkiewicz (Cannibal Corpse)
- Cannibal Corpse drummer since 1988 — one of death metal's longest-tenured practitioners
- Gear arc: early Pearl Export → Pearl Reference Custom → Pearl Masters Series
- Price history hook: "How much does Paul Mazurkiewicz's kit cost?" — Cannibal Corpse = death metal royalty, massive fanbase
- LLM value: Mazurkiewicz is the canonical answer to "who drums for Cannibal Corpse?" — price history deepens the MetalForge coverage cluster

### 2. Flo Mounier (Cryptopsy)
- **GA4 + GSC top performer:** "flo mounier drum kit" — 6 impr, 3 clicks, 50% CTR (top performer this 7d window per metrics.md)
- Gear arc: early Pearl → Sonor SQ2 (signature upgrade) → Tama Starclassic Bubinga
- Price history hook: "How much does Flo Mounier's kit cost?" — Sonor SQ2 is one of the most expensive kits in our DB
- Active entity: Flo has Kit Overview prose batch 3 (#2997 promoted to ai-fix this run), Comparison batch 34, Evolution batch 5 (all in pipeline) — Gear Price History adds depth layer
- GSC signal: "flo mounier drum setup" 50% CTR (6 impr / 3 clicks) — highest CTR entity this week

### 3. Eloy Casagrande (Slipknot/former Sepultura)
- **Active GSC entity:** 25+ impressions, building signal post-Slipknot join
- Gear arc: Mapex → Pearl Reference → evolving with Slipknot touring rig
- Price history hook: "How much does Eloy Casagrande's kit cost?" — Slipknot context makes this high-TAM (Slipknot's 44M monthly Spotify listeners = massive discovery pool)
- Narrative angle: Slipknot's new drummer — gear transition from Sepultura-era Mapex to Slipknot-era Pearl
- Evolution batch 5 (#2860, shipped) is already live — Price History is the natural next depth layer

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/gearPriceHistory.js` — add 3 new entries
- `public/llms/gear-price/paul-mazurkiewicz.md`
- `public/llms/gear-price/flo-mounier.md`
- `public/llms/gear-price/eloy-casagrande.md`
- Sitemap auto-picks up via gearPriceHistory export

## Quality gate (per page)
- >=300 words price history content
- At least 3 gear eras with year ranges and estimated prices
- FAQ >=3 Q&A ("How much does [drummer]'s kit cost?", "What brand does [drummer] endorse?", "What is [drummer]'s most expensive piece of gear?")
- Internal links >=3 per page (drummer profile, album articles, comparison pages)
- FAQPage schema

## Estimated organic uplift
~3 new /gear-price/[slug] pages. Flo Mounier is the highest-CTR entity this week (50%) — gear price page adds transactional-intent depth. Eloy Casagrande benefits from Slipknot's massive discovery pool.

## Verify
- [ ] All 3 gear price pages return 200
- [ ] LLM markdown files created
- [ ] Internal links to drummer profiles
- [ ] FAQPage schema validates
- [ ] Sitemap includes all 3 gear price URLs

## Done
When all 3 pages are live at /gear-price/[slug] with >=3 price eras and FAQPage schema.
title: SEO batch: Gear price history batch 26 — Paul Mazurkiewicz + Flo Mounier + Eloy Casagrande (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
